Sponsorships / CoinSmart

CoinSmart

miscellaneous
Affiliate
$50 per referral
affiliate
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

CoinSmart is aiming to make cryptocurrency accessible to everyone. You can buy and sell bitcoin and other digital currencies quickly and easily on desktop and mobile.

Streamer Affiliate Program

If you are a crypto advocate then this is the perfect affiliate program for you to promote on your stream and socials. For every successful referral you get $50, and your users get $15 worth of crypto for free!

If you’re doing a great job driving traffic to your link, CoinSmart will reach out to collaborate. Or if you can prove you have a strong Canadian/European following (30%+), email social@coinsmart.com—they are open to hosting social media giveaways that CoinSmart will fully fund. Prizes could be Bitcoin, your own merch, or gifted subscriptions to your channel (we’re open to creative ideas).

Note*: CoinSmart offers services to Europeans & Canadians who are above the age of 18. *NOT available to Americans.

← Back to All Sponsorships
